sourceMovie.title: The Ballad of Buster Scruggs
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Ballad of Buster Scruggs for the same reason it broke through in 2018: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a comedy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Joel Coen keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The western and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Maverick
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Ballad of Buster Scruggs clicked for you, Maverick (1994) is a strong next stop: both trade in western and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Ballad of Buster Scruggs?
faq.answer: Try Maverick, The Old Man & the Gun, Rio Bravo—each shares DNA with The Ballad of Buster Scruggs while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Ballad of Buster Scruggs?
faq.answer: The Ballad of Buster Scruggs (2018) is best described as Western, Comedy, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Ballad of Buster Scruggs worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this western lane.
